name: template_1
code:
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local STORE = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("{{DATASTORE_NAME}}")
local STAT_NAME = "{{STAT}}"
local START = {{START}}
local function ensureLeaderstats(plr)
	local folder = plr:FindFirstChild("leaderstats") or Instance.new("Folder")
	folder.Name = "leaderstats"
	folder.Parent = plr
	local v = folder:FindFirstChild(STAT_NAME) or Instance.new("IntValue")
	v.Name = STAT_NAME
	v.Parent = folder
	return v
end
local function load(plr)
	local v = ensureLeaderstats(plr)
	local key = "u_" .. plr.UserId
	local ok, data = pcall(function() return STORE:GetAsync(key) end)
	local n = (ok and type(data) == "table" and tonumber(data[STAT_NAME])) or START
	v.Value = n
end
local function save(plr)
	local folder = plr:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
	if not folder then return end
	local v = folder:FindFirstChild(STAT_NAME)
	if not v then return end
	local key = "u_" .. plr.UserId
	pcall(function() STORE:SetAsync(key, { [STAT_NAME] = v.Value }) end)
end
Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(load)
Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(save)
game:BindToClose(function()
	for _, p in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do save(p) end
end)
